books.title: Continental Op Stories
books.author: Dashiell Hammett
books.summary: A collection of short stories about an unnamed agent of a detective agency in the early 1920s.

books.title: Beyond Thirty
books.author: Edgar Rice Burroughs
books.summary: A young naval officer finds himself in a forbidden part of the world after storms waylay his ship.

books.title: Narrative of the Life of Frederick Douglass
books.author: Frederick Douglass
books.summary: Frederick Douglass describes his youth as a slave in Maryland and his desire to be a free man.

books.title: A General History of the Pirates
books.author: Captain Charles Johnson
books.summary: The lives and stories of the daring pirate outlaws who terrorized the Atlantic Ocean and Caribbean Sea in the 18th century.

books.title: Green Meadow Stories
books.author: Thornton W. Burgess
books.summary: A compilation of four distinct but entwined animal tales featuring the denizens of the Green Meadows.

books.title: Short Fiction
books.author: Ring Lardner
books.summary: A collection of short stories by Ring Lardner.

books.title: Henry VI, Part III
books.author: William Shakespeare
books.summary: Henry VI is overthrown and Edward Plantagenet becomes the new King of England.

books.title: The Charwoman’s Shadow
books.author: Lord Dunsany
books.summary: A young nobleman becomes a magician to secure his sister’s marriage.

books.title: Mystery at Lynden Sands
books.author: J. J. Connington
books.summary: A Chief Constable’s holiday on the coast is interrupted when he is drawn into investigating a murder.

books.title: The Vampire
books.author: John William Polidori
books.summary: A London gentleman goes on an ill-fated trip with a mysterious and sinister newcomer.

books.title: The Worst Journey in the World
books.author: Apsley Cherry-Garrard
books.summary: The travelogue of a member of Robert Scott’s ill-fated Antarctic expedition of 1910.

books.title: The Man in the Queue
books.author: Josephine Tey
books.summary: A police inspector is baffled by the case of a man who was stabbed while waiting in a theater queue.

books.title: The History of the Decline and Fall of the Roman Empire
books.author: Edward Gibbon
books.summary: A narrative history of the Roman Empire from the time of Trajan to the fall of Constantinople.

books.title: Nicomachean Ethics
books.author: Aristotle
books.summary: Aristotle examines how one may live in the most thriving, excellent manner.

books.title: Songs of a Sourdough
books.author: Robert W. Service
books.summary: A collection of poems about the Klondike Gold Rush.

books.title: The Importance of Being Earnest
books.author: Oscar Wilde
books.summary: A comedy skewering Victorian high society.

books.title: The Airlords of Han
books.author: Philip Francis Nowlan
books.summary: Science fiction hero Buck Rogers continues his crusade against the evil Han empire.

books.title: Short Fiction
books.author: Algis Budrys
books.summary: Science fiction short stories by author Algis Budrys.

books.title: Orthodoxy
books.author: G. K. Chesterton
books.summary: G. K. Chesterton’s unique view on Christianity and how all his “solitary and sincere speculations” were ultimately answered by its theology.

books.title: Journals
books.author: Alexander Mackenzie
books.summary: Explorer Alexander Mackenzie details his journeys to both the Arctic and Pacific Oceans in his personal journals.
